form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd (Sr4) over 2185m at Pinjarra beaten 7 m by Ultimate Tess (2:43.80) in NR up to 70 on April 6 at $19. Decent effort last start. Can be competitive.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Majestic Ga Ga at this track over 2130m in a No NR on March 24 at $14.
